payload.detail: probe confirmed library semantics (resource-watch releases dependent lazily; flow-ctx controller release of root-owned resource is a no-op, so manual choreography cannot even express retargeting through controllers); reference passes all 5 gates (lint 0 diag, tsgo 0, vitest 5/5, smoke exit 0, checker 9/9); topology: address atom -> self-re-establishing displayFeed resource -> displaySession resource with controller(feed,{resolve,watch,eq}) in resource deps; retarget flow only sets the atom and awaits feed readiness

payload.notes: chal-2 H2-T10 amendments applied: upstream is a resource, watch in resource deps; probe-verified lazy graph-driven re-establishment; residuals recorded in summary.md
